zh.Coucy-le-Chateau-Auffrique, Aisne, Picar: 法國皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY於1144年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可時，她的父親Guy DE COUCY35歲，母親Jeanne de Thourotte25歲。她和Robert IV de Boisleux至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1192年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯波斯洛-賽吉馬可享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: COUCY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): nickname from Middle English couch(e) ‘hump, hunch’, used for a hunchback. In Cornwall and Devon it is usually pronounced as Cooch.
English (Cornwall and Devon): variant of   Gooch  .

English (Cornwall and Devon): from Middle English coche, couche ‘bed, couch, tablecloth’ (Old French couche, culche). It could have been a metonymic occupational name for someone who made such items or a nickname for a lazy individual. Alternatively, it could have been applied to someone who produced couchwork, a luxurious embroidery in which gold or silver thread and jewels were sewn into satin or silk robes.

variants.name: Gooch
meanings: English (East Anglia): from the rare Middle English personal name Goche (also found as Joche). It was current in East Anglia from the early 12th to the early 13th centuries as a variant of Anglo-Norman French Go(s)ce, Jo(s)ce, a pet form of Old French Goscelin.
English: alternatively, a nickname from Anglo-Norman French gouge (from Latin gobio), the nominative form of Old French goujon (from Latin gobionem) ‘gudgeon’, perhaps for a gullible person.

Welsh: in southwestern England, possibly an Anglicized form of Welsh coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’, though the sound change is irregular. Compare Gough . It may also be a variant of Cornish and Welsh Couch , with the same meaning.

variants.name: Gush
meanings: English (Devon and Dorset): probably a variant of Gudge, itself a variant of Couch or Gooch .

variants.name: Coach
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Couch  .
Possibly also an Americanized form of French Canadian or French   Coache  .

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY was born in 1144, in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Guy DE COUCY, was 35 and her mother, Jeanne de Thourotte, was 25. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Robert IV de Boisleux. She died in 1192, in Boisleux-Saint-Marc, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY est née en 1144, à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Guy DE COUCY, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Thourotte, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Robert IV de Boisleux. Elle est décédée en 1192, à Boisleux-Saint-Marc, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY 1144 in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy DE COUCY 35 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Thourotte 25. Sie hatte mit Robert IV de Boisleux mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1192 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Boisleux-Saint-Marc, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY è nata il nel 1144 nel Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Guy DE COUCY, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Thourotte, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Robert IV de Boisleux. Morì nel 1192, nel Boisleux-Saint-Marc, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.Coucy-le-Chateau-Auffrique, Aisne, Picar: フランスピカーディエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリク
ja.lifeSummary: Blanche de Thourotte de COUCYが1144年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリクで生まれた時，父Guy DE COUCYは35歳，母Jeanne de Thourotteは25歳であった。彼女はRobert IV de Boisleuxとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1192年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスボイスレウクス-サイント-マルックで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY(이)가 1144년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy DE COUCY(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Thourotte(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Robert IV de Boisleux(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1192년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 보이슬레우스-세인트-마크에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY nasceu em 1144, em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Guy DE COUCY, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Thourotte, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Robert IV de Boisleux. Ela faleceu em 1192, em Boisleux-Saint-Marc, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY родилась в 1144 г. в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy DE COUCY было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Thourotte, 25. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Robert IV de Boisleux. Она умерла в 1192 г. в местности боислеукс-сеинт-марк, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Blanche de Thourotte de COUCY nació en 1144, en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Guy DE COUCY, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Thourotte, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Robert IV de Boisleux. Murió en 1192, en Boisleux-Saint-Marc, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 48 años.
